queries.question: Show me the formats that every advertisement has.
queries.sql: SELECT Formats.format_name  from Advertisements_Formats join Formats on Advertisements_Formats.format_id = Formats.id join Advertisements on Advertisements_Formats.advertisement_id = Advertisements.id   GROUP BY Advertisements_Formats.format_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Advertisements_Formats.advertisement_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Advertisements)

queries.question: Show me the formats that every advertisement has.
queries.sql: select advertisements.title , formats.format_name from Advertisements_Formats join Formats on Advertisements_Formats.format_id = Formats.id join Advertisements on Advertisements_Formats.advertisement_id = Advertisements.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?format_name WHERE {
  ?advertisements_formats a :Advertisements_Formats .
  ?formats a :Formats .
  ?advertisements_formats p:hasFormats ?formats .
  ?advertisements a :Advertisements .
  ?advertisements_formats p:hasAdvertisements ?advertisements .
  ?advertisements p:title ?title .
  ?formats p:format_name ?format_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the formats that every advertisement has.
